---
title: "Basket Power Simulation Frequentist"
author: "Angelo Capasso"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

source("basket_functions.R")

set.seed(2025)
n_sim_real <- 2000
```

```{r}
# Panel 1: High effect
scenarios_effect08 <- list(
  list(name = "P1: high heterogeneity, effect size = 0.8",     n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.8, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P1"),
  list(name = "P2: low heterogeneity, effect size = 0.8",      n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.8, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P2"),
  list(name = "P3: moderate heterogeneity, effect size = 0.8", n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.8, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P3")
)

# Panel 2: Moderate effect
scenarios_effect05 <- list(
  list(name = "P1: high heterogeneity, effect size = 0.5",     n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.5, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P1"),
  list(name = "P2: low heterogeneity, effect size = 0.5",      n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.5, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P2"),
  list(name = "P3: moderate heterogeneity, effect size = 0.5", n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.5, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P3")
)

# Panel 3: Low effect
scenarios_effect02 <- list(
  list(name = "P1: high heterogeneity, effect size = 0.2",     n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.2, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P1"),
  list(name = "P2: low heterogeneity, effect size = 0.2",      n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.2, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P2"),
  list(name = "P3: moderate heterogeneity, effect size = 0.2", n_baskets = 5, n = c(17,15,18,12,23), mu_treat = rep(0.2, 5), sd = 1, scenario_code = "P3")
)
```

```{r}
results_08_basket_freq <- run_all_basket_freq(scenarios_effect08)
results_05_basket_freq <- run_all_basket_freq(scenarios_effect05)
results_02_basket_freq <- run_all_basket_freq(scenarios_effect02)
```

```{r}
summary_table_08_basket_freq <- build_summary_basket_freq(results_08_basket_freq)
summary_table_05_basket_freq <- build_summary_basket_freq(results_05_basket_freq)
summary_table_02_basket_freq <- build_summary_basket_freq(results_02_basket_freq)
```

```{r}
effect_1 <- rep(0.8, 5)
effect_2 <- rep(0.5, 5)
effect_3 <- rep(0.2, 5)

power_all_basket_freq <- bind_rows(
  # High heterogeneity – P1
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_1, heterogeneity = "high", scenario_label = "P1 – High heterogeneity"),
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_2, heterogeneity = "high", scenario_label = "P1 – High heterogeneity"),
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_3, heterogeneity = "high", scenario_label = "P1 – High heterogeneity"),
  
  # Low heterogeneity – P2
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_1, heterogeneity = "low", scenario_label = "P2 – Low heterogeneity"),
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_2, heterogeneity = "low", scenario_label = "P2 – Low heterogeneity"),
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_3, heterogeneity = "low", scenario_label = "P2 – Low heterogeneity"),
  
  # Moderate heterogeneity – P3
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_1, heterogeneity = "moderate", scenario_label = "P3 – Moderate heterogeneity"),
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_2, heterogeneity = "moderate", scenario_label = "P3 – Moderate heterogeneity"),
  find_power_curve_basket_freq(mu_treat = effect_3, heterogeneity = "moderate", scenario_label = "P3 – Moderate heterogeneity")
)
```

```{r}
library(openxlsx)

# Crea un nuovo workbook
wb <- createWorkbook()

# Aggiungi i fogli
addWorksheet(wb, "Summary_08")
addWorksheet(wb, "Summary_05")
addWorksheet(wb, "Summary_02")
addWorksheet(wb, "Power_Curves")

# Scrivi i dati nei fogli
writeData(wb, "Summary_08", summary_table_08_basket_freq)
writeData(wb, "Summary_05", summary_table_05_basket_freq)
writeData(wb, "Summary_02", summary_table_02_basket_freq)
writeData(wb, "Power_Curves", power_all_basket_freq)

# Salva il file
saveWorkbook(wb, "basket_simulation_power_freq.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)

```
